author: Qixuan
name: FP16 Embed + MLP992 Sliding-Window Size-Repair Probe
blurb: Local 8xL20Z non-record probe that combines FP16 tied-embedding export, MLP_HIDDEN=992 size repair, and sliding-window evaluation at stride 64. The run completes cleanly under the 16,000,000-byte cap and is packaged as a bounded research submission draft with TTT intentionally skipped.
